solutions.title: EV Fast Charging Solution
solutions.subtitle: High-efficiency SiC power solution for electric vehicle charging stations
solutions.description: Complete SiC power solution for EV fast charging featuring Wolfspeed C3M SiC MOSFETs and C3D SiC diodes for 99% efficiency.
solutions.longDescription:
The EV Fast Charging Solution from Cree (Wolfspeed) provides a complete power electronics platform for DC fast charging stations. This solution leverages the superior performance of Silicon Carbide (SiC) technology to achieve industry-leading efficiency and power density.

The solution addresses the demanding requirements of EV charging including high power levels (50kW to 350kW), wide output voltage range (200V to 1000V), and high reliability for 24/7 operation. Wolfspeed's C3M series SiC MOSFETs enable switching frequencies above 50kHz, reducing magnetic component size by 40% compared to silicon IGBT solutions.

Key features include bidirectional power flow for V2G applications, integrated thermal management, and comprehensive protection functions. The solution supports CCS, CHAdeMO, and GB/T charging standards for global deployment.

benefits.title: Ultra-High Efficiency
benefits.description: 99% peak efficiency reduces energy costs and cooling requirements

benefits.title: High Power Density
benefits.description: 40% smaller magnetics due to high-frequency SiC switching

benefits.title: Bidirectional Power
benefits.description: Supports V2G and grid stabilization applications

benefits.title: Proven Reliability
benefits.description: Billions of field hours in automotive applications

customerCases.challenge: Needed high-efficiency power solution for 350kW ultra-fast charging stations
customerCases.solution: Implemented Cree SiC-based power module with C3M0032120K MOSFETs
customerCases.results: Achieved 99% efficiency and 40% size reduction compared to IGBT solution
customerCases.feedback: The SiC solution exceeded our efficiency targets and enabled compact station design.
customerCases.result: Deployed in 500+ charging stations across North America and Europe

customerCases.challenge: Required bidirectional charging capability for V2G grid services
customerCases.solution: Designed bidirectional DC-DC converter using Cree SiC devices
customerCases.results: Achieved 98.5% efficiency in bidirectional mode with full CCS compliance
customerCases.feedback: The bidirectional capability opens new revenue streams through grid services.
customerCases.result: Operating in 200+ locations providing V2G services

faeInsights.content: SiC technology is transformative for EV charging. The C3M0032120K enables switching at 50-100kHz, dramatically reducing magnetic component size. Key design considerations include proper gate drive design with negative turn-off voltage, careful PCB layout for high dv/dt, and thermal management for continuous operation.

faqs.question: What efficiency can be achieved?
faqs.answer: Peak efficiency of 99% is achievable with proper design using C3M SiC MOSFETs and optimized magnetics.

solutions.title: Renewable Energy Solution
solutions.subtitle: High-efficiency SiC power conversion for solar and wind inverters
solutions.description: Complete SiC power solution for renewable energy inverters featuring Wolfspeed C3M SiC MOSFETs for 99% efficiency and 25-year reliability.
solutions.longDescription:
The Renewable Energy Solution from Cree (Wolfspeed) provides high-efficiency power conversion for solar inverters, wind turbines, and energy storage systems. This solution leverages SiC technology to achieve 99% efficiency and 25-year operational life.

Solar inverter designers face challenges including wide input voltage ranges, high switching frequencies for compact designs, and extreme reliability requirements for 25-year warranties. Wolfspeed's C3M series SiC MOSFETs address these with industry-leading performance and proven field reliability.

The solution supports string inverters (5kW to 250kW), central inverters (1MW+), and hybrid storage inverters. SiC technology enables transformerless designs and reduced cooling requirements, lowering system cost and improving reliability.

benefits.title: Maximum Efficiency
benefits.description: 99% peak efficiency maximizes energy harvest and ROI

benefits.title: Compact Design
benefits.description: High frequency enables smaller magnetics and filters

benefits.title: Lower Cost
benefits.description: Reduced cooling and passive component costs

customerCases.challenge: Needed 99% efficiency for 250kW utility-scale string inverter
customerCases.solution: Designed with C3M0065090K SiC MOSFETs in 3-level topology
customerCases.results: Achieved 99% CEC efficiency and 25-year warranty qualification
customerCases.feedback: SiC technology was essential for achieving our efficiency and reliability targets.
customerCases.result: Shipped 10,000+ inverters with cumulative 5GW installed capacity

customerCases.challenge: Required reliable converter for offshore wind turbine with 25-year life
customerCases.solution: Implemented Cree SiC-based converter with redundant design
customerCases.results: Achieved 98.5% efficiency and passed all offshore environmental tests
customerCases.feedback: The reliability of SiC devices is critical for offshore applications.

faeInsights.content: SiC is transformative for solar inverters. The C3M0065090K enables 3-level topologies at 50kHz+, reducing filter size by 50%. For 25-year reliability, proper thermal design and derating are essential.

faqs.question: What efficiency improvement over silicon IGBTs?
faqs.answer: SiC provides 1-2% efficiency improvement, translating to significant energy harvest gains over 25 years.
